finding: ATM-GOV-0195 surfaced a batch queue-head playbook that instructed batch checkpoint, but batch checkpoint failed because no active batch run existed; a later next --claim switched the same task to normal single-task playbook.
expectedBehavior: The router and playbook should not oscillate between batch and normal for the same active queue-head. If checkpoint is required, next --claim should create or recover the active batch run; if normal close is correct, the preview should not instruct batch checkpoint.
evidenceOrRepro: node atm.mjs next --prompt "Continue active task ATM-GOV-0195..." --json returned channel=batch and checkpointCommand. node atm.mjs batch checkpoint --actor codex-governance-optimizer --json then failed with ATM_BATCH_RUN_MISSING. node atm.mjs next --claim ... later returned recommendedChannel=normal.
followUp: Create a lifecycle parity test covering active imported task -> next preview -> claim -> checkpoint/close surface, and make ATM_BATCH_RUN_MISSING provide a repair command that actually converges.
